remarks: 190 Brookwood Lane is set in one of New Canaan's most unique and desirable residential settings - a bucolic landscape of rolling meadows, mature woodlands, and gently flowing streams set on just over 3 acres of quintessential New England beauty. Situated in the heart of New Canaan, the property offers a peaceful and established neighborhood setting where quiet roads, mature trees, and estate-scale properties create an atmosphere increasingly difficult to replicate. This extraordinary proposed residence blends timeless New England architecture with refined modern living. Designed by Tanner White Architects as the quintessential New Canaan colonial with gracious proportions and exceptional scale, the home is envisioned with approximately 7,500 square feet across the first and second floors, including expansive entertaining spaces, dramatic 10-foot ceilings on the main level, generously scaled bedrooms, and seamless indoor-outdoor living throughout. The proposed floor plan includes 6 bedrooms, 8 bathrooms, 3-car garage, and pool with the opportunity to finish attic and lower-level spaces for more than 10,000 total square feet. The oversized homesite provides exceptional flexibility for estate level outdoor amenities while maintaining tremendous privacy and natural beauty.
